current_implementation.technical_decision: Opcao B: preencher a aba MEMORIA diretamente com dados do Supabase
current_implementation.template_public_state: Sanitized on 2026-05-08: no BASE sheet, no real consolidated unit data, MEMORIA input cells blank.
current_implementation.dependency_decision: exceljs was added because xlsx does not preserve workbook template styles, borders and merged-cell fidelity reliably.

ui_fixes_delivered_in_pr43.issue: motion.tr with row-accent class caused column misalignment after Framer Motion upgrade
ui_fixes_delivered_in_pr43.fix: Replaced motion.tr with native TableRow, applied table-fixed layout and colgroup with percentage widths

ui_fixes_delivered_in_pr43.issue: Panel showed hardcoded mock cards instead of wiring to the real generator
ui_fixes_delivered_in_pr43.fix: Integrated DocumentsPanel with useUnidadeDetalhe + generateDemonstrativoBasico + file-saver saveAs

document_generation_constraints: Fill MEMORIA directly from vw_unidade_detalhe data
Do not depend on the BASE sheet for the individual file
Do not depend on XLOOKUP for the individual file
Do not publish templates in public/ with real consolidated BASE data
Remove the BASE sheet from generated individual workbooks if present
Preserve template layout, formulas, borders and merged cells
Keep official document rules under human review
mandatory_after_task: Update decisions, roadmap, or backlog when scope or priority changes
